/home/talowe/rv1126b/rv1126b_linux6.1_sdk_v1.1.0/buildroot/output/rockchip_rv1126b/host/bin/aarch64-buildroot-linux-gnu-g++ --sysroot=/home/talowe/rv1126b/rv1126b_linux6.1_sdk_v1.1.0/buildroot/output/rockchip_rv1126b/host/aarch64-buildroot-linux-gnu/sysroot -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/rknn_yolo26_cam.dir/main.cc.o CMakeFiles/rknn_yolo26_cam.dir/postprocess.cc.o CMakeFiles/rknn_yolo26_cam.dir/rknpu2/yolo26.cc.o -o rknn_yolo26_cam  -Wl,-rpath,/home/talowe/rv1126b_aidemo/yolo26_cam/cpp/3rdparty/rknpu2/Linux/aarch64: utils.out/libimageutils.a utils.out/libfileutils.a utils.out/libimagedrawing.a -lopencv_core -lopencv_flann -lopencv_videoio -lopencv_video -lopencv_highgui -lopencv_imgcodecs -lopencv_imgproc ../../3rdparty/rknpu2/Linux/aarch64/librknnrt.so ../../3rdparty/jpeg_turbo/Linux/aarch64/libturbojpeg.a ../../3rdparty/librga/Linux/aarch64/librga.a
